name: responsible-ai-lab
description: Realtime Responsible AI workshop platform with four interactive workshop worlds.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c gold,green "npm run dev -w @responsible-ai-lab/server" "npm run dev -w @responsible-ai-lab/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @responsible-ai-lab/shared && npm run build -w @responsible-ai-lab/ui && npm run build -w @responsible-ai-lab/server && npm run build -w @responsible-ai-lab/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @responsible-ai-lab/shared && npm run build -w @responsible-ai-lab/ui && npm run typecheck -w @responsible-ai-lab/server && npm run typecheck -w @responsible-ai-lab/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @responsible-ai-lab/shared && npm run test -w @responsible-ai-lab/server
